title: oenothera parviflora var. canescens
intro: Oenothera parviflora var. canescens, also known as evening primrose, is a perennial plant species in the family Onagraceae, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving skin and hair health, and supporting heart health, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Evening primrose oil, extracted from the seeds, can be used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tinctures, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
